channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Governor Inuwa Yahaya Disbands Gombe Executive Council for Political Restructuring
item.description: Governor Muhammad Inuwa Yahaya of Gombe State has dissolved the entire Executive Council, creating a fresh wave of political movement within the state government. The announcement came during the 53rd...

item.title: Iran Warns Against Peace Talks After Israeli Strikes on Lebanon
item.description: Following a ceasefire announced by President Donald Trump, tensions in the Middle East remain high as Israel launched its heaviest strikes on Lebanon, killing hundreds. Iran's lead negotiator, Mohamme...

item.title: How to Create a Calmer and More Relaxing Home Environment
item.description: Creating a home that promotes calm and relaxation doesn't necessarily require expensive purchases. According to interior designers with therapy backgrounds, several simple and effective strategies can...

item.title: Canadian Astronauts Acknowledge Calls for Enhanced Food Supply in Space
item.description: In a recent development, Canadian astronauts have publicly addressed the increasing calls for improvements in the food supply for those working in space. While the specifics of the requests remain con...

item.title: Reflections on Pets, Television, and Human Desire
item.description: In this reflective essay, Rosalie Ham draws parallels between her experiences with her Scottish terrier, Harriet, and the complexities of human relationships, using an episode of The Sopranos as a len...

item.title: Kenyan Teacher Shares Unexpected Messages from Grade 8 Pupil
item.description: A Kenyan teacher, Emily, recently surprised many on social media after revealing a series of bold messages she received from a Grade 8 pupil. The boy persistently asked Emily to be his 'boy and friend...

item.title: Atletico Madrid Beat Barcelona 2-0 in Champions League First Leg
item.description: For Champions League quarter-final first leg, Atletico Madrid show strong form as dem 2-0 win over Barcelona at Camp Nou. Barcelona start well, Marcus Rashford dey create chances down left side, but A...

item.title: ABS-CBN, PACE, and Assumption College organize Pinoy Media Congress 2026 for students and educators
item.description: ABS-CBN, in collaboration with the Philippine Association of Communication Educators (PACE) and Assumption College San Lorenzo, is set to host the Pinoy Media Congress 2026. This event aims to gather ...

item.title: Trump announces halt to Iran's uranium enrichment and joint effort to remove nuclear material
item.description: In a major shift, US President Donald Trump declared that there will be no more uranium enrichment by Iran, revealing a joint US-Iran operation to dig up and remove nuclear material left from previous...

item.title: BJP Seeks Third Consecutive Term as Assam Gears Up for 2026 Polls After Delimitation
item.description: The upcoming Assam Assembly elections in 2026 mark the first contest after the state's recent delimitation of constituencies, which has altered the boundaries and voter compositions across several sea...

item.title: Constitutional Court instructs Cash Paymaster Services to refund R81 million to SASSA following invalid contract ruling
item.description: The Constitutional Court of South Africa has ruled that Cash Paymaster Services (CPS) must repay over R81 million in profits earned from an unlawful contract with the South African Social Security Age...

item.title: Assembly Elections 2026 Begin in Assam, Kerala, and Puducherry; Results on May 4
item.description: The 2026 Assembly elections have commenced today, April 9, across Assam, Kerala, and the Union Territory of Puducherry, marking the start of the electoral season in India. Voting began at 7 a.m. and w...

item.title: Study links seasonal patterns to diverticulitis flare-ups in Australia
item.description: A University of Sydney study has found that cases of diverticulitis – an inflammatory bowel condition causing symptoms like nausea, diarrhoea, constipation, and fever – tend to peak during Australia’s...

item.title: Calls for Nairobi to be Managed by the National Government
item.description: The article presents a collection of reader opinions addressing diverse issues. A significant point raised is the call for Nairobi to be restructured, with David Githae arguing that the county system ...

item.title: BHP faces decision on future coal operations in Queensland
item.description: BHP has spent the past four years considering its position in Queensland following the state government’s decision to increase coal royalty rates. With a new CEO, Mike Henry, stepping in after Andrew ...

item.title: EFF supporters gather at Constitutional Court to demand Phala Phala judgment
item.description: On Wednesday, a significant number of EFF supporters congregated outside the Constitutional Court in Johannesburg to demand the release of the long-awaited judgment in the Phala Phala case. The legal ...

item.title: Global Resource Competition Disrupts Oil Markets and Highlights Strategic Vulnerabilities
item.description: Over the past year, the world don dey experience serious shortages of key resources wey modern economies and militaries dey depend on. China don block export of rare earths and critical minerals, whil...

item.title: Trump criticises NATO's lack of support during Iran conflict, considers punishing uncooperative allies
item.description: Donald Trump has expressed his anger towards NATO allies for not providing sufficient support during the Iran war, reportedly considering punitive measures against those he feels failed to contribute....

item.title: Kenyan Man Ends Relationship Respectfully Citing Financial Strain and Life Goals
item.description: A Kenyan man has captured social media attention after sending a respectful and honest break-up message to his girlfriend, citing financial strain and differing life goals as the main reasons for endi...

item.title: Philippine Airlines Restarts Flights to Riyadh
item.description: Philippine Airlines (PAL) has announced the resumption of its flights to Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, effective April 9, 2026. This move signifies a positive development in the airline's operations and provi...
